subcodes.first_line: Light belongeth unto God, glory belongeth unto God, sovereignty belongeth unto God, splendor belongeth unto God, power belongeth unto God. He is the One Who through His Most Exalted Word hath ascended above all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور لله العزه لله الامر لله البهاء لله القدره لله اوست قادریکه بکلمه علیا من علی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
